_note: 3 thematic playlists. videoIds reference Video.id in content/videos.json. coverImage falls back to `banner/banner.png` (bare R2 key, resolved via lib/utils/asset-url) until real cover art lands.

playlists.title: Calm Sounds for Naps
playlists.description: Long-play soundtracks designed for the slow afternoons and the deep snores that follow.

playlists.title: Rainy Day Watch
playlists.description: Cozy ambient stories and sound for grey afternoons when the pack stays in.

playlists.title: Adventures with Max
playlists.description: Hikes, hills, and frozen lakes — Max leads the way through the great outdoors.
